{{Infobox religious building
| name = Asukatano Shrine
| native_name = 飛鳥田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

| map_caption = Asukatano Shrine

{{nihongo|'''Asukatano Shrine'''|飛鳥田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11467693|ltq=Q11467693|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}}
** Series ordinal: 55
** P155: {{ill|Q135038788|ltq=Q135038788|qid=Q135038788|1=Ohokurano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Mahatakino Shrine|lt=Mahatakino Shrine|qid=Q135038791|1=Mahatakino Shrine}}
